---
title: "hsgp_basis"
generated: true
description: "Build a Hilbert-space approximate GP smooth (HSGP) for covariate `x`."
---

[тА╣ back to `nitrix.stats.basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:hsgp_basis -->
```python
hsgp_basis(x: Float[Array, ' n'], n_basis: int = 20, *, kernel: str = 'matern52', rho: Optional[float] = None, amplitude: float = 1.0, boundary: float = 1.5, bounds: Optional[Tuple[float, float]] = None, center: bool = True) -> SplineBasis
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:hsgp_basis -->
Build a Hilbert-space approximate GP smooth (HSGP) for covariate `x`.

A reduced-rank stationary GP on the bounded domain $[c - L, c + L]$
($c$ the data midrange, $L = boundary \cdot \text{half-range}$),
expanded in the Dirichlet-Laplacian eigenfunctions
$\phi_j(x) = \sqrt{1/L} \sin(\sqrt{\lambda_j}\,(x - c + L))$ with
$\sqrt{\lambda_j} = j \pi / (2 L)$.  The kernel enters **only**
through the spectral density weights
$s_j = S_\theta(\sqrt{\lambda_j})$
(`spectral_density`): the whitened design is
$\Psi = [\sqrt{s_j}\, \phi_j(x)]$ with an **identity penalty**, so
the basis is a drop-in smooth for [`gam_fit`](../nitrix-stats.qmd) and the
Fellner-Schall smoothing parameter $\lambda = 1 / \sigma_f^2$ is the
GP amplitude.

Unlike the kriging [`gp_basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/gp_basis.qmd), the eigenfunctions are independent of
the kernel hyperparameters, so the lengthscale `rho` enters as a diagonal
reweighting of a fixed design -- the basis for eigendecomposition-free
lengthscale estimation (the standalone [`gp_fit`](../nitrix-stats.qmd); not
this constructor, which fixes `rho`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:hsgp_basis -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Float` | `n` | тАФ | `(n,)` covariate values. |
| `n_basis` | `int` | тАФ | `20` | Number of retained eigenfunctions `m` (the reduced rank). |
| `kernel` | `str` | тАФ | `'matern52'` | Stationary kernel: `'matern12'` / `'matern32'` / `'matern52'` / `'rbf'` (squared-exponential). See `spectral_density`. |
| `rho` | `Optional[float]` | тАФ | `None` | Kernel lengthscale. Defaults to the data half-range (a sane fixed value; lengthscale *estimation* is the standalone [`gp_fit`](../nitrix-stats.qmd)). |
| `amplitude` | `float` | тАФ | `1.0` | Kernel amplitude folded into the weights; keep `1.0` when fitting via [`gam_fit`](../nitrix-stats.qmd) (the smoothing parameter carries the amplitude). |
| `boundary` | `float` | тАФ | `1.5` | Domain-extension factor `L / half-range` (`>= 1`; default `1.5`). Larger values reduce boundary bias; small `rho` needs larger `n_basis`. |
| `bounds` | `Optional[Tuple[float, float]]` | тАФ | `None` | `(lo, hi)` data range override (defaults to the data min/max). |
| `center` | `bool` | тАФ | `True` | Apply the sum-to-zero identifiability constraint (default `True`). |

**Returns** `SplineBasis`. The [`SplineBasis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/SplineBasis.qmd) for the HSGP smooth (`kind='hsgp'`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:hsgp_basis -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
